hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.db|*.conf|*.env|*auth.conf|*users.conf) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Protected file — do not edit directly"}'; exit 2;; esac; }
